name: io.github.ugurcl/dbridge-mcp
description: Query SQLite, PostgreSQL, and MySQL in plain language - read-only, with column masking and limits.

packageArguments.description: Database to expose: a SQLite file path, or a postgresql:// / mysql:// connection string

environmentVariables.name: DBRIDGE_CONFIG
environmentVariables.description: Absolute path to a dbridge.config.json with safety settings (row caps, hidden/masked columns, table allow/block lists)
